library_preparation_preflight.summary: No deterministic setup is needed. The artifact is a Maven SCM Git executable provider with normal Maven transitive dependencies; it does not require optional test dependencies or a Docker-backed service. The reported failure is an API signature change in GitTagCommand.createCommandLine, not missing setup.
risks: If the generated test chooses to execute real Git commands instead of testing command-line builders/consumers, it must create and initialize a temporary Git repository in test code and configure local user.name/user.email before commits or tags. This is test logic, not driver setup.

input_evidence.name: issue
